title: Events: image pull event not emitted when building image from Dockerfile with `pull` set to true
body:
### Issue Description

An image pull event is not emitted when building an image from a Dockerfile with the `pull` field set to `true`.
https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html?version=v4.4#tag/system/operation/SystemEventsLibpod


### Steps to reproduce the issue

1. Build an image with the `pull` field set to `true`
2. Get the events from this endpoint: https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html?version=v4.4#tag/system/operation/SystemEventsLibpod
3. Observe that no image pull event is emitted.


### Describe the results you received

No image pull event received

### Describe the results you expected

Expected an image pull event, same as Docker.

### Additional information

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@flouthoc this is happening most likely because the pull is happening in Buildah, and buildah does not create a podman event.  Any thoughts on how we could fix this?

I can think of two ways:

* Either perform pull first (in podman) and then call buildah API
* Extend Buildah API which can allow callers to set callback function : So podman can configure a callback function for buildah to generate events.
